name: chatmark-extension
description: ChatMARK - Bookmark tabs for AI chat conversations

scripts.build:all: mkdir -p dist && npm run build && npm run build:css && npm run build:fonts && npm run build:icons && npm run build:manifest
scripts.dev: npm run build:all && npm run watch
scripts.lint: eslint eslint.config.js src/constants.js src/rail/*.js src/state.js src/storage.js src/text.js test/*.js
scripts.format: prettier --write .sisyphus/plans/chatmark-improvements.md .github/workflows/ci.yml eslint.config.js package.json src/constants.js src/content.css src/content.js src/rail.js src/rail/*.js src/state.js src/storage.js src/text.js test/*.js tsconfig.json types/chrome.d.ts
scripts.format:check: prettier --check .sisyphus/plans/chatmark-improvements.md .github/workflows/ci.yml eslint.config.js package.json src/constants.js src/content.css src/content.js src/rail.js src/rail/*.js src/state.js src/storage.js src/text.js test/*.js tsconfig.json types/chrome.d.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:stability
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build:all
